hero.heading: Maccabi Belarus — the national team within the global Maccabi movement
hero.text: We bring together athletes, volunteers, and partners to represent Belarus internationally and prepare for Maccabiah 2026.

maccabiBelarus.heading: Maccabi Belarus
maccabiBelarus.text:
Maccabi Belarus is a national team and a long‑term sports and cultural project initiated by the Jewish Religious Association in the Republic of Belarus.

Our goal is to build a strong, sustainable national presence within the Maccabi movement and open the path to international participation for athletes of all nationalities.

globalLink.heading: Part of the global Maccabi movement
globalLink.text:
We are connected with Maccabi World Union and share the values of fair play, respect, and mutual support.

This gives access to international connections, participation standards, and the movement’s ecosystem of events.

pillars.heading: Sport, identity, international participation
pillars.text: The project is built on three pillars — so every participant has a clear pathway: from training and community to international competitions.
items: Sport: selection, training, and teamwork across disciplines.
Identity: community, values, and respect for cultural diversity.
International participation: tournaments, exchange of experience, and representing Belarus.

worldUnion.heading: Maccabi World Union
worldUnion.text: Maccabi World Union is the largest international Jewish sports organization. It unites hundreds of thousands of members worldwide and supports national teams and clubs.

maccabiah.heading: Maccabiah 2026
maccabiah.text: Maccabiah is the second-largest sports event in the world after the Olympic Games. It takes place every four years in Israel and brings together tens of thousands of athletes from 80+ countries.
items: A unique format: competitions for both professionals and amateurs of all ages.
A global platform: sport, health, and shared values in one event.
A meaningful goal for Belarus: international visibility and a strong motivator for youth development.

whyBelarus.heading: Why it matters for Belarus
whyBelarus.text: Maccabiah is more than sport — it is an international platform that increases visibility and creates opportunities for people and partners.
items: International image: positioning Belarus as a modern, open country that respects cultural diversity; participation and victories become positive media stories.
Domestic development: a clear goal motivates young people to train consistently; the project is open to everyone and demonstrates social cohesion.
Economy and diplomacy: networking on an international stage and building bridges for humanitarian and business cooperation.

sponsors.heading: Partners & sponsors
sponsors.text:
To achieve this ambitious goal, we invite partners and sponsors to collaborate. Any contribution is valuable and important for the development of the team and the movement.

Partnering with Maccabi Belarus is a long‑term commitment with clear social and reputational value.
benefits: Association with the international sports movement Maccabi World Union.
Participation in a respected global project with history and reputation.
Support for sport, youth, and a healthy lifestyle.
Contribution to a positive international image of Belarus.
Public acknowledgement: logo on training uniform and the website, mentions in social media and PR integrations.

form.heading: Apply to the team
form.text: Leave your application — we will get back to you with the next step. If you choose “Other”, please specify your sport.
form.thankYou: Thank you, {name}! We received your application and will contact you soon.
